name: Pineapple-Macadamia Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, sugar, oil, pineapple juice, and crushed pineapple.
2. Mix well.
3. Sift baking powder with flour and mix into the mixture.
4. Fold in chopped macadamia nuts.
5. Pour batter into a greased, wax-paper-lined 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 50 minutes.
- Alternatively, fill greased muffin pans 3/4 full and bake for 25 minutes.
7. Makes 1 loaf or 18 muffins.
